description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Include a global before_script that updates apt, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads and extracts the Android SDK tools zip, installs the specified platform, platform-tools and build-tools via sdkmanager, sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, makes gradlew executable, accepts all SDK licenses, and restores pipefail handling. In the build stage add an assembleDebug job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. Also in the build stage add a lintDebug job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:lintFdroidDebug -PbuildDir=lint and ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:lintPaidDebug -PbuildDir=lint. In the test stage add a debugTests job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:testFdroidDebug and ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:testPaidDebug.
